rules.detail: security scan used FALLBACK tools, not real scanners: ['Secret Detection (Gitleaks)', 'Vulnerability Scanner (Trivy)', 'SBOM Generator (Syft)']. A fallback PASS is UNVERIFIED — real gitleaks/trivy/syft must run.
machine scan artifact records 18 HIGH findings while the narrative claims 0 HIGH — the dirty scan was never regenerated post-remediation. Require a single reconciled final scan.
18 HIGH findings not covered by a signed, unexpired accepted-risk allowlist (prose 'false positive' does not count).
shipping posture is APPROVED_FOR_PRODUCTION_RELEASE while the gate doc still lists gates as PENDING — posture and gate status disagree.

note: fail-closed: any FAIL => NO-GO. UNKNOWN never counts as PASS.
